prestazioni: Engine swap to J37A4 (3.7L V6 from Acura RL) with forged internals: CP-Carrillo pistons (11.5:1 CR), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 500+ hp reliability on E85. Paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power SPEC-L with 200-cell catalytic converters for JDM compliance.

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom top-mount intercooler by GReddy Type-RS (400x200x120mm core) and a Tomei M82 titanium wastegate for precise boost control (22 psi peak). Fuel system upgraded with Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup for crankcase ventilation.

Custom ECU reflash via Hondata KPro V4 for the J37A4, optimized for forced induction with individual cylinder trims, launch control (3,500 RPM hard cut), and traction control via a KW Automotive V3 coilover conversion (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear springs) with Ohlins Road & Track dampers for chassis stability. Drivetrain reinforced with a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.5-way) and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch aluminum, rated for 800 Nm torque).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Elysion-specific, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 front bumper (modified for JDM fog light compatibility) and a custom rear diffuser by AutoExe for improved airflow management.

Custom 22-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5J ET+20 front, 11J ET+15 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (265/30/22 front, 295/25/22 rear) and a custom air suspension setup by Air Lift Performance (3P management, dual compressors) for adjustable ride height and camber (via SPC adjustable front upper control arms).

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara inserts) mounted on custom floor mounts by NRG Innovations, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom roll cage by Cusco (8-point, bolt-in, chromoly steel) for structural rigidity. Exterior accents include a custom livery by Fuchsfarbe (matte gunmetal with neon green pinstripes) and a custom LED taillight conversion by VLED (sequential turn signals, smoked lenses).
